name: steelman-suite
description: Multi-AI devil's advocate skill suite for Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / any Agent Skills host. Reviewers build the strongest case AGAINST your code in isolation, then an aggregator merges findings. Heterogeneous jury + tool-interactive verification + calibrated confidence + steelman finding schema.
author: ooookaaay

skills.name: steelman:attack-fix
skills.description: Multi-AI jury attacks a specific commit / diff. Strips implementer's reasoning trace before review. Outputs steelman + counter + verifiable file:line + calibrated confidence.

skills.name: steelman:attack-finding
skills.description: Meta-review of a claimed bug or audit finding. Verifies against actual source code. Multi-model vote on REAL / FALSE-POSITIVE / BY-DESIGN / LATENT.

skills.name: steelman:devils-pair
skills.description: Lightweight 2-agent same-family + cross-family quick check. ~30s-60s wall-clock. Use mid-edit for fast sanity check before saving.

skills.name: steelman:full-codebase
skills.description: Orchestrator — domain-scoped parallel adversarial pass across the entire repository. Uses ≤5 parallel subagents matched to common src/ layout (processing / publish / storage / orchestration / eval-ingestion).

skills.name: steelman:pre-mortem
skills.description: Klein-style past-tense failure brainstorm. Frames the proposed change as 'two weeks from now, this failed catastrophically — why?' Surfaces 30% more candor than forward-looking risk analysis (HBR 2007).

skills.name: steelman:verify-claim
skills.description: Verifies a file:line bug claim against actual source. Runs grep / read / pytest as needed. Returns CONFIRMED / FALSIFIED / UNVERIFIABLE with execution evidence.

hooks_optional.description: OPT-IN. Runs attack-fix ONLY when staged diff touches paths in STEELMAN_HIGH_BLAST_PATHS env var. Adds 5-10 min to push for those changes; zero overhead otherwise. Routine commits never trigger this. Copy to ~/.claude/settings.json `hooks` array to enable.

OPT-IN. Runs devils-pair on cumulative diff after Edit/Write touches >25 LOC. ~60s background. Operator-configurable threshold via STEELMAN_PAIR_LOC_THRESHOLD env var. Default disabled — copy to settings.json to enable.

hooks_intentionally_disabled_by_default: The suite is opt-in by design. Auto-firing adversarial review on every commit destroys flow without proportional safety benefit. You choose what to gate.

providers_required.rationale: Heterogeneous multi-model jury per PoLL (Verga 2024), Jury-on-Demand (2512.01786), A-HMAD (2025) — ≥3 providers with 2/3 agreement threshold prevents single-family correlated errors. Falls back to dialectical-bootstrap (same model, two independent passes with stripped framing) when only one provider available.
